missionFull.heading: We Are Passionate About Hair Health and Inclusivity
paragraphs: Our mission is to help women of all hair textures feel proud of their natural hair by providing exceptional products designed for wavy, curly, and coily hair.

Infused with nutrient-rich ingredients, our products nourish, repair, and strengthen — leading to extraordinary results that enhance self-expression and boost self-confidence through proper hair care rituals.
No matter your hair type, texture, or pattern — whether a loose wave, bouncy curls, or tight coils — your needs are unique, and we are here to celebrate them.

founder.name: Michelle O'Connor
story: Michelle O'Connor is a 20-year hair stylist and a five-time NAHA winner — a trailblazer, influencer, educator, Matrix global artistic director, and an emerging voice on diversity and inclusion within the beauty industry.

As a stylist, colorist, and educator specializing in textured, patterned hair for over 20 years, she's proud to be part of a movement that celebrates the beauty of our hair. Throughout her career, she and her clients have seen the transformative effect of three things: great products designed for textured hair, nutrient-rich ingredients, and proper hair care rituals.

Her Caribbean heritage and passion for beautiful hair give her a deep, personal understanding of the needs of textured hair. The Caribbean is a melting pot of cultures, textures, and patterns — a fusion that expresses itself in our hair rituals and in the restorative ingredients found throughout the islands. It informs everything we do at Out of Many Beauty.

points.title: Moisture Retention
points.body: Curly, wavy, and coily hair types tend to have a more porous structure due to the natural shape of the hair strands. This makes it easier for moisture to escape and hair to become dry and frizzy.

points.title: Growth
points.body: Curly, wavy, and coily hair can appear to grow more slowly than straight hair because of the coil pattern, which can make length changes challenging to notice.

points.title: Performance
points.body: When hair doesn't perform as desired, it can lead to styling difficulties, loss of curl definition, and the need for frequent touch-ups or restyling.

solution.heading: The Solution
solution.intro: Our patented complex delivers conditioning benefits that nourish, fortify, and protect — while promoting extraordinary, healthy hair growth and helping hair maintain its natural curl or wave pattern, hold styles, and resist frizz.

ingredients.heading: Our Ingredients
ingredients.intro: We carefully source our ingredients from around the world and work with suppliers who share our values of sustainability and ethical practices.
